question_text:
Monotone Increasing Digits

Given an integer $n$, return the largest integer less than or equal to $n$ such that its digits are in non-decreasing order.
explanation: Start from the right. If $s[i-1] > s[i]$, decrease $s[i-1]$ by 1 and mark the position. All digits to the right of this position should be set to 9 to maximize the number.
